title: oenothera howardii
intro: Oenothera howardii, also known as the Hoary California Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species in the Onagraceae family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Oenothera howardii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems.
